name: syllabus_filtering
description: From raw syllabus text, extract only Course Description, Learning Outcomes, and Topics/Schedule. Ignore everything else.
template:
Your job is to extract ONLY three pieces of information from the syllabus text below. Ignore everything else.

EXTRACT ONLY:
1. course_description — What the course is about (official course description, overview, or purpose). One short paragraph or a few sentences.
2. learning_outcomes — What students will learn or be able to do (learning outcomes, objectives, or goals). Bullet points or short list.
3. topics_schedule — Main topics and/or weekly schedule (course outline, week-by-week plan, or list of topics).

IGNORE COMPLETELY: Do not include any of the following. Skip them. Leave them out of your output.
- University policies, institutional policies, academic integrity, honor code, plagiarism, attendance, accommodations, disability, grading scale, grade weights, late work, make-up exams, Title IX, discrimination, harassment, conduct, FERPA, privacy, drop/withdrawal, incomplete grades, religious observance, counseling, health, resources, course Hero, Chegg, AI policy, netiquette, evaluations, food/drink policy, recordings, proctoring, laptop/phone rules, instructor contact info, office hours, TAs, textbooks, how to succeed, communication, feedback, important dates, calendar links, core syllabus policies, student recordings, course policies (grades, technology, expectations), learning support, campus offices, tutoring, writing studio, any boilerplate that applies to all courses.

The syllabus may be one long document with no clear sections—that is fine. Find and extract only the parts that are clearly: (1) course description/overview, (2) learning outcomes/objectives, (3) topics or schedule. Use exact text from the syllabus; do not rephrase. If you cannot find one of the three, use empty string "" for that field.

Return ONLY valid JSON with exactly these three keys (no markdown, no code fence):
{{
  "course_description": "...",
  "learning_outcomes": "...",
  "topics_schedule": "..."
}}

Syllabus text:
{raw_syllabus_text}

Return JSON only:

variables.raw_syllabus_text: The full raw syllabus text (may be unsectioned)
